rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow a user to create an account.
The system shall enable a user to watch videos after they have created an account.
The system shall permit a user to upload videos.
The system shall allow a user to save videos in their likes list during video viewing.
The system shall enable a user to view their saved videos from the likes list.
The system shall allow a user to enter the discussion option.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can create an account.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A user can either create an account or continue to the video section directly.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After creating an account, a user can watch videos.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user creates an account, they can then move forward to watch videos.
The user can also upload videos and then view them.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can save videos in their likes list while viewing videos.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: While viewing videos, the user may either finish there or save videos in their likes list.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can view their saved videos in the likes list.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If videos are saved in the likes list, the user can view that list and then upload videos based on those liked videos.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can enter a discussion option.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user enters the discussion option, the discussion takes place and then ends.
